Parley API
Main Navigation GuideEndpointsThemingParley

Parley APIBuild bots and integrations

A simple, powerful REST + WebSocket API. Selfbots are explicitly allowed.

Get Started
API Reference
🤖

Bots

Create a dedicated bot user that posts messages on your behalf. Shows a BOT badge in chat.

👤

Selfbots

Authenticate as yourself with an API key. Messages show a selfbot indicator. Selfbots are allowed on Parley.

⚡

Real-time

Subscribe to live events via WebSocket — messages, edits, reactions, presence, voice state.

🔑

Simple auth

All API keys start with plk_. Use them anywhere you'd use a Bearer token.

Parley Developer API
